Task  
The following is a product review. Determine if it is negative.  
Title: It simply works extremely slow  
Review: I wasted my money and the device is sitting on my shelf. The powerline does not work in my ACER new model loaded with windos vista. I had a service call fromm ATT and they could not do nothing either. It works when I connect it to DirecTV for "on demand" downloading movies, but it is so slow that it took two days to download a movie. So at least my experience is that I totally wasted my money.  

Yes
